cards.text:
Da Nang4 hoursBa Na Hills & Golden Bridge Day Tour from Da NangJoin me on a journey to one of Vietnam's most famous attractions. Located nearly 1,500 meters above sea level, Ba Na Hills offers breathtaking mountain views, cool weather, impressive architecture, and the world-famous Golden Bridge supported by giant stone hands.

The itinerary is flexible and can be adjusted according to weather conditions and your interests.Ba Na Hills & Golden Bridge Day Tour from Da NangFROM$29/ per groupFROM$29/ per groupCam P.

Da Nang8 hoursFrom Da Nang I Full-Day Tour to Marble Mountains & Hoi An by Car (1-4 pax)Discover a captivating half-day journey that takes you from majestic natural wonders to a nostalgic cultural haven.

Your first stop is the Marble Mountains – a cluster of limestone and marble hills rising dramatically in the heart of Da Nang. 
Next, you’ll head to the enchanting Hoi An Ancient Town – a UNESCO World Heritage Site that feels like a step back in time.From Da Nang I Full-Day Tour to Marble Mountains & Hoi An by Car (1-4 pax)FROM$80/ per groupFROM$80/ per groupShining Trip
